temporal_description:
(00:00-00:04) In a dimly lit, cluttered room, three men in black robes stand menacingly. The man in the center, with platinum blonde hair, points a wand forward with a sinister grin. To his left, another man with a dark, intense expression also points his wand. Behind them, a third man with a serious face holds his wand at the ready. The blonde man speaks, his voice low and threatening. (Storyline: This scene establishes a direct threat from a group of antagonists, likely Death Eaters, to an unseen person, setting a tense and confrontational mood.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Threatening, menacing. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous musical score begins to build tension.)
(00:05-00:07) The scene cuts to a young man with glasses and a brown jacket, Harry Potter, standing in the same dimly lit room. He looks up with a worried and slightly defiant expression as he asks a question, defending his past actions. (Storyline: Harry is revealed to be the person being threatened. His question suggests he is defending his choices and is challenging the authority of the men confronting him.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Worried, questioning, slightly defiant. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense, ominous score continues.)
